sme_leads.notes: Established barber shop operating solely through Fresha booking and directory listings with no standalone website, leaving them invisible to walk-in search traffic.
Popular Turkish barber with 294+ reviews on Birdeye but no owned website — all bookings funnelled through Fresha and a Facebook page, so a professional site would capture direct organic search.
Active nail salon with Instagram presence and Fresha bookings but no dedicated website, making it hard for new customers to find services, pricing or photos outside of third-party apps.
Nail bar marketing exclusively through Facebook with no standalone site, missing out on Google Maps organic traffic and any customers who do not use social media.
Newer nail spa relying only on Facebook, Instagram and Fresha — no website means no SEO presence and no way to showcase treatments or pricing on an owned channel.

dts.title: DVSA wait times are hitting 6+ months — here's how to swap your test date in under 10 minutes
dts.hook: Open with a screenshot of a real DVSA booking screen showing a 6-month wait, then cut to the DrivingTestSwap flow in real time.
dts.cta: Link in bio — swap your test date today

dts.title: POV: You passed your driving test 3 months early because of a test date swap
dts.hook: First-person POV of opening a 'Test Date Available' notification, accepting the swap, and cutting to a 'I passed!' reaction clip or graphic.
dts.cta: Don't wait 6 months — swap your date at drivingtestswap.uk

athletics.title: Weekly calisthenics progression: filmed at the gym tracking pull-up or muscle-up journey week by week
athletics.hook: Day 1 vs Week 8 split-screen — same exercise, visible strength gain, minimal editing needed.

athletics.title: Sprint technique breakdown: slow-motion track clip comparing good vs. bad acceleration mechanics
athletics.hook: Film your 40m sprint from the side in slow-mo, overlay text callouts on foot strike, arm drive and forward lean.
athletics.cta: Save this if you want to run faster
